name: Pixel Commando
description: Pixel Commando is an action-packed 2D run-and-gun shooter inspired by classic arcade games. Fight through dangerous levels, defeat powerful enemies, and face epic boss battles. Unlock new stages, collect coins, and upgrade your skills as you battle across jungles, snow lands, lava zones, and futuristic cities. Are you ready to become the ultimate commando? Play now and prove your shooting skills!
instructions: Use arrow keys or A D to move Jump using Space or W Shoot enemies using J or Mouse Avoid enemy bullets Defeat all enemies to clear the level Collect coins for upgrades Defeat bosses to unlock new stages
